message: I've been reading up on hurricane prep lately, and honestly, the Red Cross has some really solid guidance that actually makes the whole thing feel less overwhelming—they break it down into manageable steps you can tackle way before storm season even hits. The kind of thing where a little planning now means you're not scrambling if something actually comes your way. Have you ever been through hurricane season where you live, or is it more of a "just in case" concern for you?
